name: Employer wants me back light duty after injury in Centerville, must I?
description: Optional if doctor okays; protects full benefits.[4]

mainEntity.name: Employer wants me back light duty after injury in Centerville, must I?

acceptedAnswer.text: Optional if doctor okays; protects full benefits.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description: **No requirement, but accepting may not cut benefits if unsuitable.** Utah doesn't mandate return.[4] Key factors: Doctor approves; if worsens, more comp. Refuse unsafe duty. Negotiate with insurer.
